TextView.android:text: Pick an APK/APKS/APKM/XAPK/ZIP and install (built-in; script optional)
Uses the current Package file above. This patches android:debuggable=true and signs APKs with the bundled debug keystore using official Android signing.
Patches android:debuggable=true, signs with the debug key using official Android signing, then exports the rebuilt package.

Inspect, unpack, edit smali, decode resources, rebuild, and sign APK workspaces from the current Package file. Built-in smali actions work without apktool; resource decode/rename/rebuild uses apktool when enabled and available. Heavy work runs in the background and uses staged work folders instead of loading whole packages into the UI.

Pick a package file above. Decode Resources/Rebuild/Rename use apktool when enabled. Rebuild does not need smali unless you edited smali. Targeted manifest patch changes the decoded manifest only; Provider authorities updates content-provider authorities during package rename.

com.google.android.material.checkbox.Mat.android:text: Use selected app permissions in dropdown

TextView.android:text: Save/load package-state lists or load bundled debloat presets for review before enabling/disabling packages.

Package state list: Save/Load use the All/Enabled/Disabled filter. Bundled presets load from assets/package_states, preselect all rows for review, and do not disable anything until Disable Packages is confirmed.
